name: aprende-comigo-plugins
description: Bespoke Claude Code plugins by Aprende Comigo for educational platform development

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Feature development and bug-fixing workflows with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

plugins.name: neon
plugins.description: Neon Serverless Postgres integration with MCP tools, platform guidance skill, and a specialized Drizzle ORM + Neon database workflow agent for schema design, migrations, connections, and queries.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Official GitHub MCP server for repository management with Aprende Comigo project board workflow support. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories, and manage the development kanban board (Backlog, In Progress, In Review, Done) with automated transitions.
